DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF HOUSTON FUNDING LTD.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE; DECLARE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED; AND MONETARY SANCTIONS GRANTED: 1. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED EXCEPT ATTORNEY CLIENT AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE; 2. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER; 3. SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290.00, PAYABLE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses; Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY
ADELINA GONZALEZ, DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, (415)731-5927

TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS AS FOLLOWS:

Plaintiff Houston Funding Ltd.'s Motion to compel response; declare requests for admission deemed admitted; and monetary sanctions granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories, special interrogatories AND REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS within TWENTY days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported. (610/PS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Set For Trial On Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
